testcase.name: LogInErrorValidation

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: div[aria-label='Incorrect email or password.']' (tried for 5 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: div[aria-label='Incorrect email or password.']' (tried for 5 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at testcase.name: ProductErrorValidation
